retry_reason: drm_dev_get unconditionally increments the refcount and never fails, so retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: This wrapper is invoked when a VMA is opened (e.g., during mmap). It acquires a reference on the drm_device stored in vma->vm_private_data, ensuring the device remains alive while the VMA exists. The VMA subsystem must later call a corresponding put (e.g., drm_dev_put) when the VMA is closed to release the reference. This is a standard get-ref-on-open pattern, and the reference is owned by the VMA until its close handler.
